calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Dismissal

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Continued To Mar-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 10:20am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Apellant, Balwantsinh Thakor, appears through counsel Michael Heath. Respondent, John T. Harms, appears in Pro Per. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.

Parties are working on a settlement and request a continuance. Continuance is granted to march 7, 2012.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Judgment Entered
